overview.title: Overview
overview.next_steps_intro: Finish setup so your agent can start working.
overview.step_connect_evolution: Connect an Evolution API instance in Settings → Integrations
overview.step_upload_kb: Upload your knowledge base (FAQs and pricing) in Knowledge
overview.step_define_staff: Set schedules and staff in Staff and Calendar
overview.step_personalize_prompt: Customize your agent's prompt in Settings → Agent

content.title: AI Content
content.subtitle: Drafts generated by CCAVAI for LinkedIn, Instagram, and Facebook. Review, approve, and copy to publish.
content.empty_hint: Tap Generate content above to have CCAVAI create drafts from today's news.
content.run_badge: {stories, plural, one {# story} other {# stories}} · {drafts} drafts
content.settings_pending_body: We're initializing your CCAVAI settings. Reload the page in a few seconds.
content.settings_subtitle: Configure how CCAVAI generates content for your brand: which RSS sources to monitor, which platforms to feed, what tone to use, what to say, and what to avoid.

conversations.empty_description: When a customer messages your WhatsApp, it'll show up here.
conversations.operator_mode_description: The bot is paused. Your messages will go straight to the customer. Hand control back when you're done.

leads.title: Leads
leads.empty_description: When AIMA finds new businesses or the agent captures customer data, they'll show up here.
leads.call_sandra_success: Sandra is calling — check ElevenLabs for the conversation.
leads.call_sandra_no_phone: No phone number on file for this lead.

customers.page_subtitle: Your customer base — conversations, bookings, invoices and notes in one place.
customers.empty_description: When a customer messages you on WhatsApp or you book a reservation manually, they'll show up here.
customers.internal_notes_desc: Private to your team. The agent does NOT see them.
customers.agent_notes_desc: What the agent has learned about the customer — this is injected into the prompt.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.no_staff_prefix: Add at least one person in
calendar.no_staff_suffix: to be able to view and book slots.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Issue, send, and collect invoices from your customers.
invoices.csv_detailed_tooltip: One row per invoice line, with tax breakdown
invoices.empty_title: No invoices in this view yet
invoices.empty_subtitle: Create an invoice from here or from a booking detail in the calendar.
invoices.edit_draft_subtitle: When you're ready, hit "Send". After that you can't edit.

services.page_description: The catalog your agent offers. When a customer asks about prices or books an appointment, the bot consults this list.

staff.page_description: The people who provide service. Mark which services each one offers so the agent only assigns bookings to those who can do them.

knowledge.page_description: Upload documents or add chunks manually. The agent retrieves these results by similarity to answer and diagnose.

billing.page_description: Your agents (WhatsApp, voice, content, marketing) spend credits per use. Top up anytime — credits never expire.
billing.topup_success: ✓ Payment confirmed. Your credits will land in seconds (Stripe processes them via webhook). Refresh if you don't see the updated balance within a minute.
billing.empty_history: No activity yet. Your first top-up will show up here.

settings_agent.personality_description: Edit the prompt template and the variables injected into every conversation. The prompt accepts placeholders like <variable></variable> that get replaced with the values below.
settings_agent.auto_vars_description: These values are injected into every conversation without any setup. Use them in your prompt with the syntax.
settings_agent.var_user_name: name of the customer who's talking
settings_agent.var_user_facts: summary of previous conversations with that customer
settings_agent.var_current_datetime: current date and time in the business time zone

settings_billing.stripe_connected_success: Stripe connected successfully. You can now invoice your customers.
settings_billing.stripe_payments_description: Connect your Stripe account to charge invoices via card, payment link, Apple/Google Pay, and recurring subscriptions. Payments go directly to your account — BolivAI never holds your money.
settings_billing.country_not_supported_title: Stripe Connect doesn't operate in {country} yet
settings_billing.country_not_supported_description: You can keep issuing invoices from BolivAI and mark them as paid manually when you receive transfers or cash. When Stripe arrives in your country, you'll be able to connect and accept cards.
settings_billing.stripe_onboarding_intro: We'll take you to Stripe for a ~5 minute onboarding (business details, bank account, identity verification). You'll come back here automatically afterward.
settings_billing.stripe_needs_more_info: Stripe still needs additional information to enable payments. Open your Stripe account and complete the pending steps.
settings_billing.business_data_description: This information appears on every invoice you send to your customers. Keep it consistent with your tax registration.
settings_billing.billing_help_text: Have questions about billing or taxes? Check the <link>Stripe Connect documentation</link>.

settings_branding.title: Branding
settings_branding.description: Customize how your agent's dashboard looks. The colors apply to every accent in the dashboard.

settings_general.title: General
settings_general.description: Basic agent details: business name, language, timezone, contact.

settings_integrations.agent_type_description: The template defines which tools your agent has and what it can do. To switch templates, contact BolivAI.
settings_integrations.gateway_description: The layer that connects your WhatsApp to the agent. Switch channel or update credentials here.
settings_integrations.n8n_description: The agent's execution engine. Every conversation comes in via webhook and is processed here.
settings_integrations.webhook_hint_evolution: Paste this into Evolution Manager → Instance Settings → Webhooks. Enable the messages.upsert event.
settings_integrations.webhook_hint_meta: Paste this as the Callback URL in Meta Business Manager → WhatsApp → Configuration → Webhook.
settings_integrations.google_description: This template needs access to your Google Calendar, Sheets, and Gmail. Connect your account so the agent can create events, save leads, and send email confirmations.

settings_team.title: Team
settings_team.description: Invite colleagues to manage this agent. Each person has a role that defines what they can do.

settings_voice.voice_agent_description: When you turn on voice, BolivAI creates a conversational agent in ElevenLabs using your current agent's prompt. Your customers can call and speak with it to book, cancel, or get answers as if it were a human assistant.
settings_voice.activate_prompt_hint: When you turn it on, we create your voice agent automatically. The prompt you already set up in Settings → Agent gets reused as-is — you don't have to rewrite it.
settings_voice.phone_description: Connect a Twilio number you already own, and BolivAI will wire it to the voice agent. Customers who call that number will speak directly with your agent.
settings_voice.call_test_hint: Try it: call that number from another phone and ask the agent about your services. Calls are billed to your Twilio account at standard rates.
settings_voice.voice_and_greeting_description: Change the agent's voice or customize the opening greeting. Changes apply on ElevenLabs instantly.
settings_voice.footer_capabilities_note: Your agent can check availability, book, reschedule, cancel, and capture leads using the same tools as the WhatsApp agent. Knowledge sync (services + FAQs) and per-minute billing are coming in the next phases.

marketing.page_description: AIMA finds business owners on the web, sends them cold email via Instantly, and routes warm replies to Sandra's call queue.
marketing.settings_missing: Settings not found — the migration didn't run. Notify the ops team.
marketing.no_runs_yet: No runs yet. Once AIMA kicks off, they'll show up here with new lead counts.

shorts.initializing_settings: Initializing VIRA settings. Refresh the page in a few seconds.
shorts.page_subtitle: Your AI agent that watches long videos and pulls out viral shorts. Paste a link, VIRA reasons over the transcript and the moments, and hands back clips ready to publish.
shorts.how_vira_reasons_prefix: It doesn't cut at random. After transcribing, it identifies: hooks in the first seconds, standalone sentences worth sharing, answers to questions, emotional shifts, and moments where audio energy peaks. Then it picks the best {count} based on your configured style (
shorts.how_vira_reasons_suffix: ) and cuts them along sentence boundaries so each clip stands on its own.
shorts.billing_explainer_prefix: 10 credits per minute of video processed (includes transcript and analysis) + 2 credits per second of clip generated. A 10-min video with 3 clips of 30 seconds = 100 + 180 =
shorts.status_refresh_hint: {status}. Refresh the page in a minute.
shorts.no_clips_generated: The job finished but no clips were generated. This can happen if the video was very short or if VIRA didn't find moments matching your criteria. Try a longer video or tweak the clip style.

sandra.page_description: Leads queued for Sandra to call outbound. Pick the ones you want Sandra to contact now, export the CSV and upload it to ElevenLabs Batch Calling. When Sandra is done, mark the result here to keep the pipeline clean.
sandra.restricted_tenant_notice: The outbound calling queue (Sandra) is currently active only for the bolivai tenant.

admin_tenants.empty_description: Create the first one to start selling the service. Each tenant is a customer with their own agent, prompt, and data.

admin_overview.page_subtitle: Revenue, usage, API costs, and margin across the entire platform.
admin_overview.tenants_by_margin_sub: Sorted by gross margin (revenue − API costs)
admin_overview.actions_sub: Where the platform wins / loses by operation type

admin_usage.page_subtitle: Detailed breakdown of which actions drive revenue, what they cost us, and which tenants consume the most.
admin_usage.actions_card_subtitle: Sorted by descending margin. The bar shows each action's share of total margin.
admin_usage.actions_empty: No usage recorded in this window
admin_usage.tenants_card_subtitle: Click a tenant to see details, transaction ledger and top-up history.

admin_pricing.page_description: Edit what we charge for each agent action (credits_per_unit) and what it costs us (cost_per_unit_micros + per-vendor breakdown). Changes show up immediately in /admin/overview, /admin/usage, the morning briefing, and each tenant's margin calculation.
admin_pricing.units_credits_per_unit: what we charge the tenant in credits. 1 credit = $0.01 USD. A WhatsApp reply at 5 cr = $0.05.
admin_pricing.units_cost_per_unit_micros: our actual cost with vendors. 1,000,000 micros = $1.00 USD. An inbound call at 200,000 micros = $0.20.
admin_pricing.units_vendor_cost_micros: per-vendor breakdown in JSON. The sum should equal cost_per_unit_micros; if it doesn't, we'll warn you.
admin_pricing.footer_tip: Tip: expand a row to edit. Changes save independently and show up in real time across all admin views.

admin_brain.page_intro: A living map of how BolivAI works. Memory, decisions, schemas, prompts, and operational knowledge — indexed and searchable. Ask a question below and the brain answers with cited sources.
admin_brain.reindex_intro: when you edit memory, docs, or add a new migration, run
admin_brain.reindex_dedup: Only re-embeds files whose content changed (dedup by sha256 hash).
admin_brain.graph_intro: Each node is an entity — agent, table, vendor, workflow, decision. Each link is a relation extracted from the corpus (uses, depends_on, writes_to, etc.). Click any node to open its detail page. Filter by type in the left panel; search by name to jump straight to it.
admin_brain.docs_mentioning_caption: Sorted by how many times it appeared. Click to jump to the source file.
admin_brain.docs_empty_legacy: (This entity was created before we wrote the doc↔entity join. It will populate after the next re-extract.)
admin_brain.nav_tip: Tip: every blue name is clickable and takes you to that entity's page. It's like browsing Wikipedia, but all about BolivAI.
admin_brain.entities_caption: Extracted automatically. Click to view detail.

admin_templates.page_subtitle: The catalog of agents BolivAI offers. Each template is an n8n workflow with a specific set of tools.

admin_tenant_detail.pnl_desc: Current balance, top-ups, credit usage, API cost and margin — last 30 days.
admin_tenant_detail.actions_desc: What this tenant spends credits on and what it costs us.
admin_tenant_detail.no_usage_30d: No usage in the last 30 days
admin_tenant_detail.config_desc: Edit any field. Changes apply immediately.
admin_tenant_detail.danger_desc: Deleting the tenant erases ALL its conversations, leads, services, staff, calendar, knowledge and members. This is irreversible.

admin_tenant_new.title: New tenant
admin_tenant_new.description: Create a new agent. You can configure its prompt, services, staff and connect it to an Evolution API instance afterward.

admin_users.team_description: People with cross-tenant access to every workspace. Promote someone by email — the account must exist first (create it in Supabase → Auth → Users, or invite the person to a tenant first).

auth.signup_open_description: Create your account and set up your AI agent in under 5 minutes.
auth.forgot_description: We'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.invitation_not_found_description: The link may have expired or already been used.
auth.invitation_invalid_description: This invitation has been used or has expired. Request a new one from your team admin.
auth.accept_invitation_description: You've been invited to join {tenant} as {role}.
